generated_oml:
// ==================== Acting Components ==================== //
instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor moving the crane cart, driven by a Trinamic TMC4671‑Eval controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor raising/lowering the hoist, driven by a Trinamic TMC4671‑Eval controller"
]

instance ElectromagnetActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at the hoist end used to pick up pucks"
]

// ==================== Sensing Components ====================
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder measuring the swing angle of the hoist"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleTransmission
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring ambient wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedTransmission
]

instance MotorControllerStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor reading motor controller status (position, current, speed) via Arduino"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorStateTransmission
]

// ==================== Data Transmitted ====================
instance SwingAngleTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance MotorStateTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorControllerStateSensor
]

// ==================== Data ====================
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped swing angle values"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance MotorStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped motor controller feedback (position, speed, current)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorStateTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

// ==================== Models ====================
instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GrafanaEnabler
]

instance KinematicCraneModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used by the trajectory generator to compute swing‑optimal paths"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler
]

instance SimulationCraneModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation model of crane mechanics and controllers used for validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

// ==================== Enablers ====================
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL extension) container storing time‑series data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana container providing real‑time dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python runtime with gantrylib used to generate optimal crane trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python simulation service executing the digital replica of the crane"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance ValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Continuous validation engine comparing executed vs simulated trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for inter‑service signalling"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance DockerComposeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker Compose orchestration of all containerised components"
]

// ==================== Services ====================
instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously captures sensor data and writes time‑stamped records into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAvailabilityInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Renders real‑time system status dashboards in Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDashboardInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes swing‑minimising trajectories using the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runs the digital twin simulation of crane mechanics and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultClassificationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Validates executed trajectories against simulated ones and raises alerts on threshold breaches"
    DTDFVocab:provides SwingThresholdAlertInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlParametersAction
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Publishes and subscribes to MQTT topics for state change notifications"
]

// ==================== Insights ====================
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides the optimal trajectory that reduces swing during moves"
]

instance SwingThresholdAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual alert generated when swing angle exceeds validation thresholds"
]

instance RealTimeDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard view showing current sensor readings, actuator states, and system health"
]

instance FaultClassificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Classification output indicating potential faults detected by the simulation service"
]

instance HistoricalDataAvailabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates that historic time‑series data is stored and queryable in TimescaleDB"
]

// ==================== Actions ====================
instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator‑initiated adjustment of control parameters based on validation alerts"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance InterveneOperatorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual operator intervention to stop motion or reset the crane"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// ==================== Environment ====================
instance GantryCraneLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains
        CartStepperMotor,
        HoistStepperMotor,
        ElectromagnetActuator,
        SwingAngleEncoder,
        WindSpeedAnemometer,
        MotorControllerStateSensor,
        TimescaleDBEnabler,
        GrafanaEnabler,
        TrajectoryGeneratorEnabler,
        SimulationEnabler,
        ValidationEnabler,
        MQTTBrokerEnabler,
        DockerComposeEnabler,
        DataLoggingService,
        DataVisualizationService,
        OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService,
        SimulationService,
        ContinuousValidationService,
        MQTTBrokerService,
        Fusion360CADModel,
        KinematicCraneModel,
        SimulationCraneModel
]

// ==================== General Components (optional) ====================
instance DockerComposeComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker Compose orchestrates the six containerised components in a centralized architecture"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service computes optimal motion trajectories and sends them via MQTT to the Control Application, which uses the Physical Crane Interface to command motor set‑points; the Continuous Validation Service can also send operator alerts through the dashboard."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane ↔ Python interface ↔ Control Application, Logging Application, Human‑Machine Interface; MQTT broker links the Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation services; TimescaleDB stores data; Grafana visualizes data; all run on a single personal computer with Docker containers for DB, broker, and dashboard."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service continuously compares measured trajectories with simulated ones, computes distance metrics, checks against a predefined acceptable threshold, and raises alerts when the threshold is exceeded, thereby providing runtime fidelity assessment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between PT and DT components uses MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) for signaling and command messages; sensor data streams are written to TimescaleDB via standard PostgreSQL SQL; all Docker containers share a virtual network defined in the Docker Compose file."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin’s services (DB, MQTT broker, Grafana) are packaged as Docker containers and started with a single Docker‑Compose command; the Python modules run on the host PC; the whole repository (including source code, CAD models, documentation) is hosted on GitHub under an MIT license."
]
